fact_nuggets.text: Sand Force (Japanese: Sand Force) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI Sandstorm weather makes the Pokemon's Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves stronger. * The Pokemon isn't damaged by the Sandstorm weather condition, and the power of its Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves goes up! * S MD The Pokemon isn't damaged by a sandstorm, and the power of its Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves goes up while the sandstorm is in effect! MD RT DX The Pokemon isn't damaged by the Sandstorm weather condition, and the power of its Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves goes up while a sandstorm is in effect.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , Sand Force increases the power of Rock -, Ground -, and Steel-type moves used by the Pokemon with this Ability by 30%. A Pokemon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Sand Force has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , Sand Force increases the power of Rock -, Ground -, and Steel-type moves used by the Pokemon with this Ability by 30%. A Pokemon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would.
Strengthens rock, ground, and steel moves to 1.3 their power during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.
